tasks.label: 📘 EVENING (25 min)

tasks.label: ❓ LUNCHTIME (25 min)

tasks.label: 📘 EVENING (25 min)
tasks.resource: Organizations and delivery of psychiatry treatments.pdf
tasks.action: From the Psychomentor folder. Focus on Q8 and Q9 (recovery model: involves 'learning to live with illness', user-based recovery = 'overcoming effects of being a patient')

topic: Week 1: MEDICO-LEGAL — Human Rights, Fraser, Ethnic Variations

tasks.label: 📘 EVENING (25 min)

tasks.action: From the Psychomentor folder. Focus on Q5 (right to work is NOT a human right), Q19 & Q25 (Fraser Guidelines from Gillick case), Q20, Q28, Q29 (ethnic variations: Black = highest detention, Indian = lowest)
